化 教 真 全

Quanzhen Longmen Tradition · 全真龍門道統 全真龍門道統

Heritage in
Motion. 薪火相傳，
道統永續。

Preserving the scholarly depth of Taoist culture within the heartbeat of modern Singapore. A community rooted in the Quanzhen Longmen tradition since 2016. 在現代新加坡的脈搏中，守護道教文化的學術深度。一個植根於全真龍門道統的社群，自2016年起薪火相傳。

Explore Our Tradition探索道統傳承 Upcoming Events即將舉行的活動
Quanzhen Longmen · 全真龍門 Est. 2016 · Singapore創立於2016年 · 新加坡 Open to all歡迎各界
10+
Years in Singapore年紮根新加坡
道
Quanzhen Longmen tradition全真龍門道統
全
Open to all practitioners歡迎各界修道者

Upcoming即將舉行

Events and Activities 活動 活動與科儀

Join us for rituals, classes, and community gatherings — open to members and the public. 歡迎參加我們的科儀、課程及社群聚會，對會員及公眾開放。

30
Aug
北斗禮斗科儀（八月） · North Dipper Lidou Ritual — August
Monthly Lidou ritual, held on the last Sunday of August. Open to all. Registration required at least 3 days in advance.
Ritual
View full calendar查看完整活動日曆

Who we are我們是誰

Three Foundations三大根基

三大根基

Study · 學學 · Study
研習道學

Structured learning of Taoist scripture, philosophy, and the Quanzhen Longmen tradition — for new and experienced practitioners alike. 系統研習道教經典、哲理及全真龍門道統，適合初學者及資深修道者。

Practice · 修修 · Practice
修持科儀

Regular ritual observance, scripture recitation, and inner cultivation following the Quanzhen lineage's living tradition. 定期舉行科儀、誦經及內在修煉，依循全真龍門的活生生道統傳承。

Preservation · 傳傳 · Preservation
文化傳承

Documenting and transmitting Taoist heritage — cultural education, community outreach, and passing the tradition to the next generation. 記錄並傳承道教文化遺產，透過文化教育、社區外展，將道統薪火傳承給下一代。

Our lineage道統傳承

The Quanzhen Longmen Tradition全真龍門道統

全真龍門道統

Rooted in one of Taoism's great scholastic lineages, Quan Zhen Cultural Society carries forward a tradition of self-cultivation, communal ritual, and textual study that has endured for centuries. The Quanzhen Longmen school traces its heritage through Wang Chongyang and the Seven Perfected, emphasising inner alchemy, scriptural learning, and ethical conduct. 全真教化協會植根於道教偉大的學術道統之一，傳承自我修煉、集體科儀及典籍研習的千年傳統。全真龍門道統溯源至王重陽及全真七子，著重內丹修煉、經典學習及道德修養。

Learn about our tradition了解我們的道統

Get involved加入我們

Become Part of the Community成為我們社群的一分子

Whether you are a seasoned practitioner or simply curious about Taoism, there is a place for you at Quan Zhen Cultural Society. 無論您是資深修道者，還是對道教抱有好奇，全真教化協會歡迎您的加入。

Membership入會申請

Join as a member and access events, classes, and community resources. Registration and payment handled online. 成為會員，參加活動、課程及社群資源，網上登記及繳費。

Join now立即申請
Volunteer with us成為義工

Support our events, ritual activities, and cultural preservation work. Register your interest via our volunteer form. 支援我們的活動、科儀及文化傳承工作，透過義工登記表格表達意願。

Register interest登記意向
Get in touch聯絡我們
Quan Zhen Cultural Society
全真教化協會

Quan Zhen Cultural Society is dedicated to the study, practice, and cultural preservation of the Taoist tradition. Est. 2016.
